title: Alec Splash Quotes
quotes: Alec Rollison compiles first, just to catch compiler bugs.
Unsatisfied with O(1), Alec Rollison ships O(1/n).
Alec Rollison has binary readability.
Alec Rollison has binary writability.
Alec Rollison can parse HTML with a regex. Correctly.
Compilers do not warn Alec Rollison. Alec Rollison warns compilers.
Alec Rollison does not do code analysis. He does code appreciation.
Alec Rollison once shifted a bit so hard it landed on another machine.
Alec Rollison wrote an O(n^2) algorithm once. It solved TSP.
Alec Rollison quicksorts his laundry.
Alec Rollison remembers one password. Everything else is SHA-256.
There is no Ctrl key on Alec Rollison's keyboard. He is always in control.
Alec Rollison says Hello World, and the world replies Hello Alec.
Alec Rollison can get 1s out of /dev/zero.
Alec Rollison invented MapReduce to sort fan mail.
Once Alec Rollison ordered a list, and the list obeyed.
Errors treat Alec Rollison as a warning.
Alec Rollison's watch shows seconds since January 1, 1970.
Alec Rollison can losslessly compress random data.
Alec Rollison mines bitcoin in his head.
Alec Rollison can instantiate abstract classes.
gcc -O4 sends your code to Alec Rollison for a rewrite.
Alec Rollison does not sleep(). He wait()s.
Web search is just Alec Rollison's unit test.
